creator: mark@kyne.com.au
text:
Hi Ryo,

I noticed that the Molden distfile had been changing repeatedly so I
looked into it. It turns out that the authors repackage it regularly
including new bugfixes and features, but they don't bump the version
number!

If this continues (and I see no reason why it won't) this port is just
going to break again ;(.

Perhaps the port should be for 3.6? That version is unlikely to change
again. Or are there "must have" features in version 3.7 which warrant
it in the ports tree?

As the FreeBSD maintainer for Molden you could try to convince the
authors to adopt a patchlevel scheme (ie 3.7.1, 3.7.2) to prevent this
insanity. Maybe they will listen to reason ;).

Thanks for your patch.

Regards,
Mark

-- 
Mark Pulford    \   10.0 times 0.1 is hardly ever 1.0
mark@kyne.com.au \  http://www.kyne.com.au/~mark/
markp@FreeBSD.org \ http://www.FreeBSD.org/
